description: Build chromatograms from MS1 data: total ion chromatogram (TIC), base peak chromatogram (BPC), and extracted ion chromatograms (XIC) for target m/z values within a ppm tolerance. Writes a tidy CSV (rt, trace, intensity) and optionally a PNG plot.
rules: writes chromatograms.csv under record_store (defaults to TIC if none of TIC/BPC/MZ requested)
MZ is a space-separated list of target m/z for XIC; PPM sets the tolerance
usage: Set INPUT (mzML/mzXML). Optional TIC=1, BPC=1, MZ (space-separated m/z), PPM, PLOT_ON=1. Output: chromatograms.csv (+ chromatograms.png).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 + numpy (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; the plot also needs matplotlib. If absent the porter still creates chromatograms.csv and records the reason.
